LanguageData.Ammo_12mmRailgun_SabotOE.label: 12mm Railgun cartridge (Sabot:OE)
LanguageData.Ammo_12mmRailgun_SabotOE.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for large-caliber railgun weapons.
LanguageData.Bullet_12mmRailgun_SabotOE.label: 12mm Railgun bullet (Sabot:OE)
